name: Products are displayed on the homepage

methodName: Products are displayed on the homepage

testSteps.description: Given the homepage has loaded with products

children.description: Shopper opens the browser at http://localhost:3001

testSteps.description: Then product cards should be visible
And each product card should show a title and price

userStory.narrative:
As an online shopper on Linea Supply
  I want to see products on the homepage
  So that I can discover items to buy
